message:
feat(brenner-loop): add Hypothesis Arena for competing hypotheses (an1n.6)

Implements the core Brenner insight: science is about discriminating
between competing hypotheses, not just confirming one.

## hypothesis-arena.ts (Core Types & Functions)
- HypothesisArena interface for managing competing hypotheses
- ArenaHypothesis with source tracking (primary, object_transpose, etc.)
- ArenaTest and HypothesisTestResult for cross-hypothesis testing
- Elimination tracking with reason recording
- Bold prediction scoring (vague/specific/precise/surprising multipliers)
- buildComparisonMatrix for visual comparison

## HypothesisArena.tsx (React Component)
- CompetitorCard showing hypothesis status, score, and details
- ComparisonMatrixTable for test results across hypotheses
- StatusBadge for active/eliminated/champion states
- ResultCell for supports/challenges/neutral/eliminates
- Graveyard collapsible for eliminated hypotheses
- Leader tracking and discriminative power calculation

Exports from both lib and components index.ts

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
